title: T-033 — Pick override audit service (WH §9.6)
prompt:
# T-033 — Pick override audit service (WH §9.6)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §9.6
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `recordPickOverride` service writing a pick_overrides row whenever picked_lp ≠ suggested_lp. Used by Scanner consume-to-WO (T-034) and desktop FEFO deviation modal.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/pick-override.ts`: function `recordPickOverride({pick_request_id, wo_id, to_line_id, suggested_lp_id, picked_lp_id, reason_code, reason_text, confirmed_by})`.
2. Compute `delta_days = picked.expiry_date - suggested.expiry_date` (NULL-safe).
3. INSERT pick_overrides row.
4. Aggregate-side: a separate KPI service (out-of-scope here) reads pick_overrides for the dashboard override_rate metric.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/pick-override-log.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/pick-override-log.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given suggested expiry 2026-05-01 and picked expiry 2026-05-10, when audit recorded, then delta_days=9.
2. Given reason_code='other' without reason_text ≥10 chars, when called, then service rejects (V-WH-FEFO-002 — DB CHECK from T-007).
3. Given the row is inserted, when outbox is inspected, then a `pick.override_recorded` event is emitted (or wired via T-047).

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/pick-override.test.ts` asserting delta calculation, reason gate, RLS.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test pick-override`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip reason_code (V-WH-FEFO-002).
- Do not allow picked_lp = suggested_lp without explicit flag (no-op confirmations OK but caller decides).

## Dependencies
- T-007
